title: PDCONNECT - 211info
text: CITY OF COOS BAY PDCONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation such as illegal campsites, street maintenance, abandoned vehicles, non-emergency tip line, identify theft or fraud, or other public nuisances. 500 Central Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, French, German, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (Simplified) AREA SERVED: City of Coos Bay Services: Abandoned Vehicle Reporting/Removal Identity Theft Reporting/Recovery Programs Non-Emergency Crime Reporting Public Nuisance Reporting Public Nuisance Reporting * Homelessness Issues Street Maintenance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF COOS BAY LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF COOS BAY POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF COOS BAY
